task_completion.description: Open the correct document in a word processor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: LibreOffice Writer (or similar word processor) is open with 'hvac_service_manual.docx' in the title bar or the document title 'AirMax 5000 Series Commercial Rooftop Unit' visible.

task_completion.description: Mark the required terms as index entries throughout the document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the 'Insert Index Entry' dialog box being used for the required terms, or gray field shadings around terms like 'Compressor', 'Condenser coil', etc., in the document text.

task_completion.description: Create a new page at the end of the document with a 'Heading 1' titled 'Index'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A new page at the end of the document containing the word 'Index' formatted as a large heading (Heading 1).

task_completion.description: Generate the alphabetical index below the 'Index' heading.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An alphabetical index block inserted under the 'Index' heading, listing the required terms (e.g., Blower motor, Capacitor, Compressor) with their corresponding page numbers.

task_completion.description: Save the modified document to the specified output path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog showing the path '/home/ga/Documents/hvac_manual_indexed.docx' or the application title bar updated to show 'hvac_manual_indexed.docx'.

integrity.description: The agent used the word processor's GUI to mark entries and generate the index.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with LibreOffice Writer menus (e.g., Insert -> Table of Contents and Index -> Index Entry) rather than terminal commands or python scripts.

integrity.description: The index is a genuinely generated field, not manually typed text.
integrity.visual_evidence: The index block has a gray background (typical for generated fields in LibreOffice) or perfectly aligned page numbers with dot leaders, indicating it was generated by the software.

integrity.description: The original document content was not deleted or corrupted.
integrity.visual_evidence: Original headings like 'System Overview' or 'Installation Procedures' and paragraph text are still visible in the document.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The input document contains 6 sections and 10 required terms distributed throughout. The required terms to be indexed are: Compressor, Condenser coil, Evaporator coil, Refrigerant, Thermostat, Blower motor, Expansion valve, Economizer, Heat exchanger, and Capacitor. The final index must be on a new page at the end, under a Heading 1 titled 'Index', and the file must be saved as '/home/ga/Documents/hvac_manual_indexed.docx'.
